testcase.name: tearDown

error.message: Timed out waiting for driver server to stop. Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.7' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.firefox.FirefoxDriver Command: [54bad772-1914-4f03-b205-9eed1564c471, quit {}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: true, browserName: firefox, browserVersion: 149.0, moz:accessibilityChecks: false, moz:buildID: 20260318190823, moz:geckodriverVersion: 0.36.0, moz:headless: false, moz:platformVersion: 10.0, moz:processID: 38644, moz:profile: C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Loc..., moz:shutdownTimeout: 60000, moz:webdriverClick: true, moz:windowless: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10....}
